name: Gold IOU — Tranche A
tagline: Gold-backed IOU instrument — Deal Series A — issued via Troptions Gateway.
description: XAUA is a gold-backed IOU issued by the Troptions Gateway on the XRP Ledger and Stellar mainnet. Each unit represents a redeemable claim on gold (XAU) value under the terms of the Troptions $100M Deal Series A agreement. Issuance, transfer, and redemption are governed by the Troptions compliance framework and applicable deal documentation. The currency code XAUA follows the ISO 4217 XAU (gold) convention with Tranche A designation.
longDescription: XAUA is Tranche A of the Troptions Gold IOU series, structured to complement the BTCA Bitcoin IOU in the $100M Deal Series A capital arrangement. The issuer (Troptions Gateway) maintains gold or gold-equivalent reserves in a segregated custody arrangement. Holders may present XAUA IOUs for redemption against physical gold, gold futures, or USD-equivalent value subject to KYC verification and deal terms. The instrument is issued on both XRPL (hex currency code 5841554100000000000000000000000000000000) and Stellar (asset code XAUA) from the governance-controlled issuer addresses.

compliance.redemptionTerms: Redemption requires KYC verification and execution of deal Series A gold redemption form. Gold or USD-equivalent disbursed within 5 business days.
compliance.custodyArrangement: Segregated gold or gold-equivalent custody, verifiable on request.
